        if (src.QuestCompleted != null && src.QuestCompleted[873].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(636); blocks.SetBit(1510); }
        if (src.QuestCompleted != null && src.QuestCompleted[874].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(636); blocks.SetBit(1511); }
        uint blocksMask0 = 0;
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 32 && __i < 48; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask0 |= (1u << __i);
        uint blocksMask1 = 0;
        for (int __i = 32; __i < 48; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask1 |= (1u << (__i - 32));
        data.WriteUInt32(blocksMask0);
        data.WriteBits(blocksMask1, 16);
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 48; __i++)
        {
            bool __blockSet = __i < 32 ? (blocksMask0 & (1u << __i)) != 0 : (blocksMask1 & (1u << (__i - 32))) != 0;
            if (__blockSet) data.WriteBits(blocks[__i], 32);
        }
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(3)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerKnownTitlesPreamble(data, ref blocks, src);
        data.FlushBits();
        if (blocksMask0 == 0 && blocksMask1 == 0) return;
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(3)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerKnownTitlesBody(data, src);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1417)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![780]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1418)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![781]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1419)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![782]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1420)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![783]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1421)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![784]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1422)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![785]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1423)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![786]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1424)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![787]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1425)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![788]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1426)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![789]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1427)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![790]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1428)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![791]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1429)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![792]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1430)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![793]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1431)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![794]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1432)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![795]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1433)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![796]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1434)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![797]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1435)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![798]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1436)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![799]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1437)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![800]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1438)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![801]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1473)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![836]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1475)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![838]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1478)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![841]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1480)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![843]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1481)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![844]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1482)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![845]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1484)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![847]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1485)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![848]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1486)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![849]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1487)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![850]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1488)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![851]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1489)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![852]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1490)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![853]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1491)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![854]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1492)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![855]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1493)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![856]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1494)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![857]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1495)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![858]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1496)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![859]!.Value);

        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1498)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![861]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1499)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![862]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1500)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![863]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1501)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![864]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1502)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![865]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1503)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![866]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1504)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![867]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1505)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![868]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1506)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![869]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1507)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![870]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1508)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![871]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1509)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![872]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1510)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![873]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1511)) data.WriteUInt64(src.QuestCompleted![874]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1512)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerGlyphsGroup(data, ref blocks, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(608)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 0);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(609)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 1);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(610)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 2);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(611)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 3);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(612)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 4);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(613)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 5);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(614)) WriteUpdateActivePlayerPvpInfo(data, src.PvpInfo!, 6);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyActivePlayerFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.ActivePlayerData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (HermesProxy.World.Objects.Version.V3_4_3_54261.ObjectUpdateBuilder.HasAnyInvSlotMapped(src)) return true;
        if (_gameState.ActiveGlyphsDirty) return true;
        if (HermesProxy.World.Objects.Version.V3_4_3_54261.ObjectUpdateBuilder.HasAnyKnownTitle(src.KnownTitles)) return true;
        if (src.FarsightObject != null) return true;
        if (src.Coinage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.XP.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NextLevelXP.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TrialXP.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Skill != null && HermesProxy.World.Objects.Version.V3_4_3_54261.ObjectUpdateBuilder.HasAnySkillChangedStatic(src.Skill)) return true;
        if (src.CharacterPoints.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxTalentTiers.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TrackCreatureMask.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MainhandExpertise.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OffhandExpertise.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedExpertise.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CombatRatingExpertise.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BlockPercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DodgePercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DodgePercentageFromAttribute.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ParryPercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ParryPercentageFromAttribute.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CritPercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedCritPercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OffhandCritPercentage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ShieldBlock.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Mastery.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Speed.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Avoidance.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Sturdiness.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Versatility.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VersatilityBonus.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpPowerDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpPowerHealing.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModHealingDonePos.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModHealingPercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModHealingDonePercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModPeriodicHealingDonePercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModSpellPowerPercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModResiliencePercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OverrideSpellPowerByAPPercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OverrideAPBySpellPowerPercent.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModTargetResistance.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModTargetPhysicalResistance.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LocalFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GrantableLevels.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MultiActionBars.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LifetimeMaxRank.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NumRespecs.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AmmoID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpMedals.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TodayHonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TodayDishonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.YesterdayHonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.YesterdayDishonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LastWeekHonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LastWeekDishonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ThisWeekHonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ThisWeekDishonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ThisWeekContribution.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LifetimeHonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LifetimeDishonorableKills.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.YesterdayContribution.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LastWeekContribution.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LastWeekRank.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.WatchedFactionIndex.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ScalingPlayerLevelDelta.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxCreatureScalingLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetSpellPower.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.UiHitModifier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.UiSpellHitModifier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.HomeRealmTimeOffset.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModPetHaste.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LocalRegenFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AuraVision.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NumBackpackSlots.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OverrideSpellsID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LfgBonusFactionID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LootSpecID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OverrideZonePVPType.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Honor.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.HonorNextLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvPTierMaxFromWins.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvPLastWeeksTierMaxFromWins.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvPRankProgress.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TrackResourceMask != null) for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) if (src.TrackResourceMask[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.SpellCritPercentage != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.SpellCritPercentage[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModDamageDonePos != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ModDamageDonePos[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModDamageDoneNeg != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ModDamageDoneNeg[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModDamageDonePercent != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ModDamageDonePercent[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ExploredZones != null) for (int i = 0; i < 240; i++) if (src.ExploredZones[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RestInfo != null && src.RestInfo[0] != null && (src.RestInfo[0].Threshold.HasValue || src.RestInfo[0].StateID.HasValue)) return true;
        if (src.RestInfo != null && src.RestInfo[1] != null && (src.RestInfo[1].Threshold.HasValue || src.RestInfo[1].StateID.HasValue)) return true;
        if (src.WeaponDmgMultipliers != null) for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) if (src.WeaponDmgMultipliers[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.WeaponAtkSpeedMultipliers != null) for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) if (src.WeaponAtkSpeedMultipliers[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BuybackPrice != null) for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++) if (src.BuybackPrice[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BuybackTimestamp != null) for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++) if (src.BuybackTimestamp[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CombatRatings != null) for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) if (src.CombatRatings[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 0 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[0] != null && (src.PvpInfo[0].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[0].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[0].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 1 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[1] != null && (src.PvpInfo[1].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[1].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[1].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 2 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[2] != null && (src.PvpInfo[2].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[2].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[2].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 3 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[3] != null && (src.PvpInfo[3].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[3].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[3].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 4 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[4] != null && (src.PvpInfo[4].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[4].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[4].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 5 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[5] != null && (src.PvpInfo[5].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[5].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[5].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.PvpInfo != null && 6 < src.PvpInfo.Length && src.PvpInfo[6] != null && (src.PvpInfo[6].Rating != 0 || src.PvpInfo[6].SeasonPlayed != 0 || src.PvpInfo[6].Disqualified)) return true;
        if (src.NoReagentCostMask != null) for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) if (src.NoReagentCostMask[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ProfessionSkillLine != null) for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) if (src.ProfessionSkillLine[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BagSlotFlags != null) for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) if (src.BagSlotFlags[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BankBagSlotFlags != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.BankBagSlotFlags[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestCompleted != null) for (int i = 0; i < 875; i++) if (src.QuestCompleted[i].HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreateContainerData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ContainerData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ContainerData();
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[0] != null ? src.Slots[0]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[1] != null ? src.Slots[1]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[2] != null ? src.Slots[2]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[3] != null ? src.Slots[3]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[4] != null ? src.Slots[4]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[5] != null ? src.Slots[5]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[6] != null ? src.Slots[6]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[7] != null ? src.Slots[7]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[8] != null ? src.Slots[8]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[9] != null ? src.Slots[9]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[10] != null ? src.Slots[10]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[11] != null ? src.Slots[11]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[12] != null ? src.Slots[12]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[13] != null ? src.Slots[13]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[14] != null ? src.Slots[14]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[15] != null ? src.Slots[15]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[16] != null ? src.Slots[16]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[17] != null ? src.Slots[17]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[18] != null ? src.Slots[18]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[19] != null ? src.Slots[19]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[20] != null ? src.Slots[20]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[21] != null ? src.Slots[21]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[22] != null ? src.Slots[22]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[23] != null ? src.Slots[23]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[24] != null ? src.Slots[24]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[25] != null ? src.Slots[25]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[26] != null ? src.Slots[26]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[27] != null ? src.Slots[27]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[28] != null ? src.Slots[28]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[29] != null ? src.Slots[29]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[30] != null ? src.Slots[30]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[31] != null ? src.Slots[31]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[32] != null ? src.Slots[32]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[33] != null ? src.Slots[33]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[34] != null ? src.Slots[34]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots != null && src.Slots[35] != null ? src.Slots[35]!.Value : HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.NumSlots.GetValueOrDefault());
    }

    internal void WriteUpdateContainerData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ContainerData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ContainerData();
        System.Span<uint> blocksBuf = stackalloc uint[2];
        var blocks = new Framework.Util.StackBitMask(blocksBuf);
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[0] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(3); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[1] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(4); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[2] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(5); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[3] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(6); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[4] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(7); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[5] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(8); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[6] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(9); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[7] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(10); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[8] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(11); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[9] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(12); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[10] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(13); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[11] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(14); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[12] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(15); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[13] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(16); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[14] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(17); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[15] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(18); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[16] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(19); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[17] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(20); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[18] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(21); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[19] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(22); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[20] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(23); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[21] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(24); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[22] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(25); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[23] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(26); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[24] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(27); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[25] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(28); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[26] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(29); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[27] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(30); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[28] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(31); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[29] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(32); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[30] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(33); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[31] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(34); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[32] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(35); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[33] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(36); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[34] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(37); }
        if (src.Slots != null && src.Slots[35] != null) { blocks.SetBit(2); blocks.SetBit(38); }
        if (src.NumSlots.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(1); }
        byte blocksMask = 0;
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 2; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask |= (byte)(1 << __i);
        data.WriteBits(blocksMask, 2);
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 2; __i++)
            if ((blocksMask & (1 << __i)) != 0) data.WriteBits(blocks[__i], 32);
        data.FlushBits();
        if (blocksMask == 0) return;
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(1)) data.WriteUInt32(src.NumSlots!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(3)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![0]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(4)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![1]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(5)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![2]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(6)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![3]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(7)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![4]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(8)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![5]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(9)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![6]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(10)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![7]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(11)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![8]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(12)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![9]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(13)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![10]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(14)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![11]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(15)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![12]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(16)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![13]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(17)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![14]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(18)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![15]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(19)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![16]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(20)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![17]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(21)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![18]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(22)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![19]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(23)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![20]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(24)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![21]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(25)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![22]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(26)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![23]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(27)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![24]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(28)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![25]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(29)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![26]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(30)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![27]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(31)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![28]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(32)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![29]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(33)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![30]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(34)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![31]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(35)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![32]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(36)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![33]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(37)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![34]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(38)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Slots![35]!.Value);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyContainerFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.ContainerData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.Slots != null) for (int i = 0; i < 36; i++) if (src.Slots[i] != null) return true;
        if (src.NumSlots.HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreateGameObjectData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.GameObjectData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.GameObjectData();
        data.WriteInt32(src.DisplayID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.SpellVisualID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.StateSpellVisualID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.StateAnimID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.StateAnimKitID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CreatedBy ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation != null && src.ParentRotation[0].HasValue ? src.ParentRotation[0]!.Value : 0f);
        data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation != null && src.ParentRotation[1].HasValue ? src.ParentRotation[1]!.Value : 0f);
        data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation != null && src.ParentRotation[2].HasValue ? src.ParentRotation[2]!.Value : 0f);
        data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation != null && src.ParentRotation[3].HasValue ? src.ParentRotation[3]!.Value : 1f);
        data.WriteInt32(src.FactionTemplate.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.Level.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt8(src.State.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt8(src.TypeID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PercentHealth ?? (byte)0);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.ArtKit.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.CustomParam.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
    }

    internal void WriteUpdateGameObjectData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.GameObjectData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.GameObjectData();
        uint mask = 0u;
        if (src.DisplayID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 4);
        if (src.SpellVisualID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 5);
        if (src.StateSpellVisualID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 6);
        if (src.StateAnimID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 7);
        if (src.StateAnimKitID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 8);
        if (src.CreatedBy != null) mask |= (1u << 9);
        if (src.GuildGUID != null) mask |= (1u << 10);
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 11);
        if (src.ParentRotation != null && (src.ParentRotation[0].HasValue || src.ParentRotation[1].HasValue || src.ParentRotation[2].HasValue || src.ParentRotation[3].HasValue)) mask |= (1u << 12);
        if (src.FactionTemplate.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 13);
        if (src.Level.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 14);
        if (src.State.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 15);
        if (src.TypeID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 16);
        if (src.PercentHealth.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 17);
        if (src.ArtKit.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 18);
        if (src.CustomParam.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 19);
        if (mask != 0) mask |= 1u;
        data.WriteBits(mask, 20);
        data.FlushBits();
        if ((mask & 1) == 0) return;
        if (src.DisplayID.HasValue) data.WriteInt32(src.DisplayID.Value);
        if (src.SpellVisualID.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.SpellVisualID.Value);
        if (src.StateSpellVisualID.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.StateSpellVisualID.Value);
        if (src.StateAnimID.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.StateAnimID.Value);
        if (src.StateAnimKitID.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.StateAnimKitID.Value);
        if (src.CreatedBy != null) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CreatedBy.Value);
        if (src.GuildGUID != null) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.GuildGUID.Value);
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags.Value);
        if ((mask & (1u << 12)) != 0)
        {
            data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation![0] ?? 0f);
            data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation![1] ?? 0f);
            data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation![2] ?? 0f);
            data.WriteFloat(src.ParentRotation![3] ?? 1f);
        }
        if (src.FactionTemplate.HasValue) data.WriteInt32(src.FactionTemplate.Value);
        if (src.Level.HasValue) data.WriteInt32(src.Level.Value);
        if (src.State.HasValue) data.WriteInt8(src.State.Value);
        if (src.TypeID.HasValue) data.WriteInt8(src.TypeID.Value);
        if (src.PercentHealth.HasValue) data.WriteUInt8(src.PercentHealth.Value);
        if (src.ArtKit.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.ArtKit.Value);
        if (src.CustomParam.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.CustomParam.Value);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyGameObjectFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.GameObjectData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.DisplayID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.SpellVisualID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StateSpellVisualID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StateAnimID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StateAnimKitID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CreatedBy != null) return true;
        if (src.GuildGUID != null) return true;
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ParentRotation != null) for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) if (src.ParentRotation[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.FactionTemplate.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Level.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.State.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TypeID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PercentHealth.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ArtKit.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CustomParam.HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreateItemData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ItemData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ItemData();
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Owner ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.ContainedIn ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Creator ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.GiftCreator ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt32(src.StackCount.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt32(src.Duration.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[0].HasValue ? src.SpellCharges[0]!.Value : 0);
            data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[1].HasValue ? src.SpellCharges[1]!.Value : 0);
            data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[2].HasValue ? src.SpellCharges[2]!.Value : 0);
            data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[3].HasValue ? src.SpellCharges[3]!.Value : 0);
            data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[4].HasValue ? src.SpellCharges[4]!.Value : 0);
        }
        data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 0);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 1);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 2);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 3);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 4);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 5);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 6);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 7);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 8);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 9);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 10);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 11);
        WriteEnchantmentCreate(data, src.Enchantment, 12);
        data.WriteInt32((int)src.PropertySeed.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32((int)src.RandomProperty.GetValueOrDefault());
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt32(src.Durability.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt32(src.MaxDurability.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        data.WriteUInt32(src.CreatePlayedTime.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteInt64(0L);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt64(0uL);
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt8((byte)0);
        }
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        }
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteUInt16((ushort)0);
        }
        data.WriteBits(0u, 6);
        data.FlushBits();
    }

    internal void WriteUpdateItemData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ItemData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ItemData();
        System.Span<uint> blocksBuf = stackalloc uint[2];
        var blocks = new Framework.Util.StackBitMask(blocksBuf);
        if (src.Owner != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(3); }
        if (src.ContainedIn != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(4); }
        if (src.Creator != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(5); }
        if (src.GiftCreator != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(6); }
        if (src.StackCount.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(7); }
        if (src.Duration.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(8); }
        if (src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(23); blocks.SetBit(24); }
        if (src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(23); blocks.SetBit(25); }
        if (src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(23); blocks.SetBit(26); }
        if (src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(23); blocks.SetBit(27); }
        if (src.SpellCharges != null && src.SpellCharges[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(23); blocks.SetBit(28); }
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(9); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[0] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(30); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[1] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(31); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[2] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(32); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[3] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(33); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[4] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(34); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[5] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(35); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[6] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(36); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[7] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(37); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[8] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(38); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[9] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(39); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[10] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(40); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[11] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(41); }
        if (src.Enchantment != null && src.Enchantment[12] != null) { blocks.SetBit(29); blocks.SetBit(42); }
        if (src.PropertySeed.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(10); }
        if (src.RandomProperty.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(11); }
        if (src.Durability.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(12); }
        if (src.MaxDurability.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(13); }
        if (src.CreatePlayedTime.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(14); }
        if (src.Context.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(15); }
        if (src.ArtifactXP.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(17); }
        if (src.ItemAppearanceModID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(18); }
        byte blocksMask = 0;
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 2; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask |= (byte)(1 << __i);
        data.WriteBits(blocksMask, 2);
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 2; __i++)
            if ((blocksMask & (1 << __i)) != 0) data.WriteBits(blocks[__i], 32);
        data.FlushBits();
        if (blocksMask == 0) return;
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(3)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Owner!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(4)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.ContainedIn!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(5)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Creator!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(6)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.GiftCreator!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(7)) data.WriteUInt32(src.StackCount!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(8)) data.WriteUInt32(src.Duration!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(9)) data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(10)) data.WriteInt32((int)src.PropertySeed!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(11)) data.WriteInt32((int)src.RandomProperty!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(12)) data.WriteUInt32(src.Durability!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(13)) data.WriteUInt32(src.MaxDurability!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(14)) data.WriteUInt32(src.CreatePlayedTime!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(15)) data.WriteInt32(src.Context!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(17)) data.WriteUInt64(src.ArtifactXP!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(18)) data.WriteUInt8((byte)src.ItemAppearanceModID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(24)) data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges![0]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(25)) data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges![1]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(26)) data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges![2]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(27)) data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges![3]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(28)) data.WriteInt32(src.SpellCharges![4]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(30)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 0);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(31)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 1);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(32)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 2);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(33)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 3);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(34)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 4);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(35)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 5);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(36)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 6);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(37)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 7);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(38)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 8);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(39)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 9);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(40)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 10);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(41)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 11);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(42)) WriteEnchantmentUpdate(data, src.Enchantment!, 12);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyItemFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.ItemData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.Owner != null) return true;
        if (src.ContainedIn != null) return true;
        if (src.Creator != null) return true;
        if (src.GiftCreator != null) return true;
        if (src.StackCount.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Duration.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.SpellCharges != null) for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) if (src.SpellCharges[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Enchantment != null) for (int i = 0; i < 13; i++) if (src.Enchantment[i] != null) return true;
        if (src.PropertySeed.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RandomProperty.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Durability.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxDurability.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CreatePlayedTime.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Context.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ArtifactXP.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ItemAppearanceModID.HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreateObjectData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ObjectData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ObjectData();
        data.WriteInt32(src.EntryID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.DynamicFlags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteFloat(src.Scale ?? 1f);
    }

    internal void WriteUpdateObjectData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.ObjectData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.ObjectData();
        uint mask = 0u;
        if (src.EntryID.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 1);
        if (src.DynamicFlags.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 2);
        if (src.Scale.HasValue) mask |= (1u << 3);
        if (mask != 0) mask |= 1u;
        data.WriteBits(mask, 4);
        data.FlushBits();
        if ((mask & 1) == 0) return;
        if (src.EntryID.HasValue) data.WriteInt32(src.EntryID.Value);
        if (src.DynamicFlags.HasValue) data.WriteUInt32(src.DynamicFlags.Value);
        if (src.Scale.HasValue) data.WriteFloat(src.Scale.Value);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyObjectFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.ObjectData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.EntryID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DynamicFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Scale.HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreatePlayerData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.PlayerData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.PlayerData();
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.DuelArbiter ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.WowAccount ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.LootTargetGUID ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PlayerFlags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PlayerFlagsEx.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.GuildRankID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.GuildDeleteDate.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.GuildLevel.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreatePlayerCustomizationsCount(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PartyType.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8((byte)0);
        data.WriteUInt8(src.NumBankSlots.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.NativeSex.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.Inebriation.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PvpTitle.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.ArenaFaction.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PvPRank.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.DuelTeam.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.GuildTimeStamp.GetValueOrDefault());
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreatePlayerQuestLog(data, src);
        }
        WriteCreatePlayerVisibleItems(data, src);
        data.WriteInt32(src.ChosenTitle.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.VirtualPlayerRealm.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.CurrentSpecID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteUInt8((byte)0);
        data.WriteInt32(src.HonorLevel.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreatePlayerLogoutTime(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        WriteCreatePlayerBnetAccount(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        WriteCreatePlayerCustomizationsData(data, src);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
    }

    internal void WriteUpdatePlayerData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.PlayerData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.PlayerData();
        System.Span<uint> blocksBuf = stackalloc uint[3];
        var blocks = new Framework.Util.StackBitMask(blocksBuf);
        if (src.DuelArbiter != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(4); }
        if (src.WowAccount != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(5); }
        if (src.LootTargetGUID != null) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(6); }
        if (src.PlayerFlags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(7); }
        if (src.PlayerFlagsEx.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(8); }
        if (src.GuildRankID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(9); }
        if (src.GuildDeleteDate.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(10); }
        if (src.GuildLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(11); }
        if (src.NumBankSlots.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(12); }
        if (src.NativeSex.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(13); }
        if (src.Inebriation.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(14); }
        if (src.PvpTitle.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(15); }
        if (src.ArenaFaction.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(16); }
        if (src.PvPRank.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(17); }
        if (src.DuelTeam.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(19); }
        if (src.GuildTimeStamp.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(20); }
        if (src.ChosenTitle.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(21); }
        if (src.VirtualPlayerRealm.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(23); }
        if (src.CurrentSpecID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(24); }
        if (src.HonorLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(27); }
        if (src.FakeInebriation.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(0); blocks.SetBit(22); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[0] != null && src.QuestLog[0]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(36); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[1] != null && src.QuestLog[1]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(37); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[2] != null && src.QuestLog[2]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(38); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[3] != null && src.QuestLog[3]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(39); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[4] != null && src.QuestLog[4]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(40); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[5] != null && src.QuestLog[5]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(41); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[6] != null && src.QuestLog[6]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(42); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[7] != null && src.QuestLog[7]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(43); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[8] != null && src.QuestLog[8]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(44); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[9] != null && src.QuestLog[9]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(45); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[10] != null && src.QuestLog[10]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(46); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[11] != null && src.QuestLog[11]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(47); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[12] != null && src.QuestLog[12]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(48); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[13] != null && src.QuestLog[13]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(49); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[14] != null && src.QuestLog[14]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(50); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[15] != null && src.QuestLog[15]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(51); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[16] != null && src.QuestLog[16]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(52); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[17] != null && src.QuestLog[17]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(53); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[18] != null && src.QuestLog[18]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(54); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[19] != null && src.QuestLog[19]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(55); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[20] != null && src.QuestLog[20]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(56); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[21] != null && src.QuestLog[21]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(57); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[22] != null && src.QuestLog[22]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(58); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[23] != null && src.QuestLog[23]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(59); }
        if (src.QuestLog != null && src.QuestLog[24] != null && src.QuestLog[24]!.QuestID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(35); blocks.SetBit(60); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(62); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(63); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(64); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(65); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(66); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(67); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(68); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[7].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(69); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[8].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(70); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[9].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(71); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[10].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(72); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[11].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(73); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[12].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(74); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[13].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(75); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[14].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(76); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[15].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(77); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[16].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(78); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[17].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(79); }
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[18].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); blocks.SetBit(80); }
        byte blocksMask = 0;
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 3; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask |= (byte)(1 << __i);
        data.WriteBits(blocksMask, 4);
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 3; __i++)
            if ((blocksMask & (1 << __i)) != 0) data.WriteBits(blocks[__i], 32);
        data.WriteBits(1u, 1);
        data.FlushBits();
        if (blocksMask == 0) return;
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(4)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.DuelArbiter!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(5)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.WowAccount!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(6)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.LootTargetGUID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(7)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PlayerFlags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(8)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PlayerFlagsEx!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(9)) data.WriteUInt32(src.GuildRankID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(10)) data.WriteUInt32(src.GuildDeleteDate!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(11)) data.WriteInt32(src.GuildLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(12)) data.WriteUInt8(src.NumBankSlots!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(13)) data.WriteUInt8(src.NativeSex!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(14)) data.WriteUInt8(src.Inebriation!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(15)) data.WriteUInt8(src.PvpTitle!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(16)) data.WriteUInt8(src.ArenaFaction!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(17)) data.WriteUInt8(src.PvPRank!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(19)) data.WriteUInt32(src.DuelTeam!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(20)) data.WriteInt32(src.GuildTimeStamp!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(21)) data.WriteInt32(src.ChosenTitle!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(22)) data.WriteInt32(src.FakeInebriation!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(23)) data.WriteUInt32(src.VirtualPlayerRealm!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(24)) data.WriteUInt32(src.CurrentSpecID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(27)) data.WriteInt32(src.HonorLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(36)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 0);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(37)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 1);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(38)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 2);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(39)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 3);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(40)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 4);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(41)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 5);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(42)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 6);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(43)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 7);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(44)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 8);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(45)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 9);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(46)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 10);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(47)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 11);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(48)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 12);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(49)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 13);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(50)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 14);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(51)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 15);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(52)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 16);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(53)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 17);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(54)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 18);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(55)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 19);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(56)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 20);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(57)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 21);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(58)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 22);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(59)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 23);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(60)) WriteUpdatePlayerQuestLogEntry(data, src.QuestLog!, 24);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(62)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 0);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(63)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 1);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(64)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 2);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(65)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 3);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(66)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 4);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(67)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 5);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(68)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 6);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(69)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 7);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(70)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 8);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(71)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 9);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(72)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 10);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(73)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 11);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(74)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 12);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(75)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 13);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(76)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 14);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(77)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 15);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(78)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 16);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(79)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 17);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(80)) WriteUpdatePlayerVisibleItem(data, src.VisibleItems!, 18);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyPlayerFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.PlayerData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.DuelArbiter != null) return true;
        if (src.WowAccount != null) return true;
        if (src.LootTargetGUID != null) return true;
        if (src.PlayerFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PlayerFlagsEx.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GuildRankID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GuildDeleteDate.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GuildLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NumBankSlots.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NativeSex.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Inebriation.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpTitle.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ArenaFaction.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvPRank.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DuelTeam.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GuildTimeStamp.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ChosenTitle.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VirtualPlayerRealm.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CurrentSpecID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.HonorLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.FakeInebriation.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[0] != null && src.QuestLog[0]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[1] != null && src.QuestLog[1]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[2] != null && src.QuestLog[2]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[3] != null && src.QuestLog[3]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[4] != null && src.QuestLog[4]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[5] != null && src.QuestLog[5]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[6] != null && src.QuestLog[6]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[7] != null && src.QuestLog[7]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[8] != null && src.QuestLog[8]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[9] != null && src.QuestLog[9]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[10] != null && src.QuestLog[10]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[11] != null && src.QuestLog[11]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[12] != null && src.QuestLog[12]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[13] != null && src.QuestLog[13]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[14] != null && src.QuestLog[14]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[15] != null && src.QuestLog[15]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[16] != null && src.QuestLog[16]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[17] != null && src.QuestLog[17]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[18] != null && src.QuestLog[18]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[19] != null && src.QuestLog[19]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[20] != null && src.QuestLog[20]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[21] != null && src.QuestLog[21]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[22] != null && src.QuestLog[22]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[23] != null && src.QuestLog[23]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.QuestLog[24] != null && src.QuestLog[24]!.QuestID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[0].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[1].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[2].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[3].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[4].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[5].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[6].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[7].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[8].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[9].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[10].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[11].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[12].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[13].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[14].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[15].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[16].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[17].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisibleItems != null && src.VisibleItems[18].HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }

    internal void WriteCreateUnitData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.UnitData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.UnitData();
        data.WriteInt64(src.Health.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt64(src.MaxHealth.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.DisplayID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.NpcFlags != null && src.NpcFlags[0].HasValue ? src.NpcFlags[0]!.Value : 0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.NpcFlags != null && src.NpcFlags[1].HasValue ? src.NpcFlags[1]!.Value : 0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Charm ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Summon ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Critter ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        }
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CharmedBy ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.SummonedBy ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CreatedBy ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Target ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteUInt64(0uL);
        WriteCreateUnitChannelDataInline(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        WriteCreateUnitRaceId(data, src);
        WriteCreateUnitClassId(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PlayerClassId.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreateUnitSexId(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt8((byte)src.DisplayPower.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreateUnitOwnerFloatPairs(data, src);
        }
        WriteCreateUnitPowerInterleaved(data, src);
        data.WriteInt32(src.Level.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreateUnitEffectiveLevel(data, src);
        data.WriteInt32(src.ContentTuningID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.ScalingLevelMin.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.ScalingLevelMax.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.ScalingLevelDelta.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteInt32(src.FactionTemplate.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreateUnitVirtualItems(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags.GetValueOrDefault());
        WriteCreateUnitFlags2Sanitized(data, src);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.AuraState.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.AttackRoundBaseTime != null && src.AttackRoundBaseTime[0].HasValue ? src.AttackRoundBaseTime[0]!.Value : 0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(src.AttackRoundBaseTime != null && src.AttackRoundBaseTime[1].HasValue ? src.AttackRoundBaseTime[1]!.Value : 0u);
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreateUnitRangedAttackTime(data, src);
        }
        data.WriteFloat(src.BoundingRadius ?? 0.389f);
        data.WriteFloat(src.CombatReach ?? 1.5f);
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteInt32(src.NativeDisplayID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteInt32(src.MountDisplayID.GetValueOrDefault());
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MinDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MaxDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MinOffHandDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MaxOffHandDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        data.WriteUInt8(src.StandState.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PetLoyaltyIndex.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.VisFlags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.AnimTier.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNumber.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNameTimestamp.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PetExperience.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNextLevelExperience.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteFloat(src.ModCastSpeed ?? 1f);
        data.WriteFloat(src.ModCastHaste ?? 1f);
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteFloat(1f);
        data.WriteInt32(src.CreatedBySpell.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.EmoteState.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt16((short)0);
        data.WriteInt16((short)0);
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreateUnitStatsInterleaved(data, src);
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreateUnitResistances(data, src);
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            WriteCreateUnitPowerCostInterleaved(data, src);
        }
        WriteCreateUnitResistanceBuffModsInterleaved(data, src);
        data.WriteInt32(src.BaseMana.GetValueOrDefault());
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.BaseHealth.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        data.WriteUInt8(src.SheatheState.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PvpFlags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.PetFlags.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt8(src.ShapeshiftForm.GetValueOrDefault());
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPower.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPowerModPos.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPowerModNeg.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.AttackPowerMultiplier.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPower.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPowerModPos.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPowerModNeg.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.RangedAttackPowerMultiplier.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteInt32(0);
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(0f);
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MinRangedDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MaxRangedDamage.GetValueOrDefault());
        }
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WriteFloat(src.MaxHealthModifier ?? 1f);
        }
        data.WriteFloat(src.HoverHeight.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.MinItemLevelCutoff.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.MinItemLevel.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.MaxItemLevel.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.WildBattlePetLevel.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteInt32(src.InteractSpellID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteInt32(src.LooksLikeMountID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.LooksLikeCreatureID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(src.LookAtControllerID.GetValueOrDefault());
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(src.GuildGUID ?? HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        WriteCreateUnitChannelObjectsCount(data, src);
        data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        data.WriteInt32(0);
        data.WriteFloat(0f);
        data.WriteUInt32(0u);
        if (IsOwner) {
            data.WritePackedGuid128(HermesProxy.World.WowGuid128.Empty);
        }
        WriteCreateUnitChannelObjectsBody(data, src);
    }

    internal void WriteUpdateUnitData(HermesProxy.World.WorldPacket data)
    {
        var src = _updateData.UnitData ?? new HermesProxy.World.Objects.UnitData();
        System.Span<uint> blocksBuf = stackalloc uint[8];
        var blocks = new Framework.Util.StackBitMask(blocksBuf);
        if (src.Health.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(5); }
        if (src.MaxHealth.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(6); }
        if (src.DisplayID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(7); }
        if (src.NpcFlags != null && src.NpcFlags[0].HasValue && src.NpcFlags[0] != 0) { blocks.SetBit(113); blocks.SetBit(114); }
        if (src.NpcFlags != null && src.NpcFlags[1].HasValue && src.NpcFlags[1] != 0) { blocks.SetBit(113); blocks.SetBit(115); }
        if (src.Charm != null) { blocks.SetBit(11); }
        if (src.Summon != null) { blocks.SetBit(12); }
        if (src.CharmedBy != null) { blocks.SetBit(14); }
        if (src.SummonedBy != null) { blocks.SetBit(15); }
        if (src.CreatedBy != null) { blocks.SetBit(16); }
        if (src.Target != null) { blocks.SetBit(19); }
        if (src.ChannelData.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(22); }
        if (src.RaceId.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(24); }
        if (src.ClassId.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(25); }
        if (src.SexId.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(27); }
        if (src.DisplayPower.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(28); }
        if (src.Level.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(30); }
        if (src.EffectiveLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(31); }
        if (src.FactionTemplate.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(40); }
        if (src.VirtualItems != null && src.VirtualItems[0].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[0]!.Value.ItemID != 0) { blocks.SetBit(167); blocks.SetBit(168); }
        if (src.VirtualItems != null && src.VirtualItems[1].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[1]!.Value.ItemID != 0) { blocks.SetBit(167); blocks.SetBit(169); }
        if (src.VirtualItems != null && src.VirtualItems[2].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[2]!.Value.ItemID != 0) { blocks.SetBit(167); blocks.SetBit(170); }
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(41); }
        if (src.Flags2.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(42); }
        if (src.AuraState.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(44); }
        if (src.AttackRoundBaseTime != null && src.AttackRoundBaseTime[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(171); blocks.SetBit(172); }
        if (src.AttackRoundBaseTime != null && src.AttackRoundBaseTime[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(171); blocks.SetBit(173); }
        if (src.BoundingRadius.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(46); }
        if (src.CombatReach.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(47); }
        if (src.NativeDisplayID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(49); }
        if (src.MountDisplayID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(51); }
        if (src.MinDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(52); }
        if (src.MaxDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(53); }
        if (src.MinOffHandDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(54); }
        if (src.MaxOffHandDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(55); }
        if (src.StandState.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(56); }
        if (src.VisFlags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(58); }
        if (src.AnimTier.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(59); }
        if (src.PetNumber.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(60); }
        if (src.PetNameTimestamp.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(61); }
        if (src.PetExperience.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(62); }
        if (src.PetNextLevelExperience.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(63); }
        if (src.ModCastSpeed.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(65); }
        if (src.ModCastHaste.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(66); }
        if (src.CreatedBySpell.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(71); }
        if (src.EmoteState.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(72); }
        if (src.BaseMana.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(75); }
        if (src.BaseHealth.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(76); }
        if (src.SheatheState.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(77); }
        if (src.PvpFlags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(78); }
        if (src.PetFlags.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(79); }
        if (src.ShapeshiftForm.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(80); }
        if (src.AttackPower.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(81); }
        if (src.AttackPowerModPos.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(82); }
