        if (src.AttackPowerModNeg.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(83); }
        if (src.AttackPowerMultiplier.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(84); }
        if (src.RangedAttackPower.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(85); }
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerModPos.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(86); }
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerModNeg.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(87); }
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerMultiplier.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(88); }
        if (src.MinRangedDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(91); }
        if (src.MaxRangedDamage.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(92); }
        if (src.MaxHealthModifier.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(93); }
        if (src.HoverHeight.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(94); }
        if (src.MinItemLevelCutoff.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(95); }
        if (src.MinItemLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(97); }
        if (src.MaxItemLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(98); }
        if (src.WildBattlePetLevel.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(99); }
        if (src.InteractSpellID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(101); }
        if (src.LooksLikeMountID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(103); }
        if (src.LooksLikeCreatureID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(104); }
        if (src.LookAtControllerID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(105); }
        if (src.GuildGUID != null) { blocks.SetBit(107); }
        if (src.ChannelObject.HasValue && !src.ChannelObject.Value.IsEmpty()) { blocks.SetBit(4); }
        if (src.Flags3.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(43); }
        if (src.OverrideDisplayPowerID.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(45); }
        if (src.DisplayScale.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(48); }
        if (src.NativeXDisplayScale.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(50); }
        if (src.ModHaste.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(67); }
        if (src.ModRangedHaste.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(68); }
        if (src.ModHasteRegen.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(69); }
        if (src.ModTimeRate.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(70); }
        if (src.TrainingPointsUsed.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(73); }
        if (src.TrainingPointsTotal.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(74); }
        if (src.AttackSpeedAura.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(89); }
        if (src.Lifesteal.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(90); }
        if (src.ScaleDuration.HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(102); }
        if (src.ComboTarget != null) { blocks.SetBit(112); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(137); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(138); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(139); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(140); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(141); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(142); }
        if (src.Power != null && src.Power[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(143); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(147); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(148); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(149); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(150); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(151); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(152); }
        if (src.MaxPower != null && src.MaxPower[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(153); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(157); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(158); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(159); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(160); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(161); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(162); }
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null && src.ModPowerRegen[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(116); blocks.SetBit(163); }
        if (src.Stats != null && src.Stats[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(175); }
        if (src.Stats != null && src.Stats[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(176); }
        if (src.Stats != null && src.Stats[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(177); }
        if (src.Stats != null && src.Stats[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(178); }
        if (src.Stats != null && src.Stats[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(179); }
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null && src.StatPosBuff[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(180); }
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null && src.StatPosBuff[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(181); }
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null && src.StatPosBuff[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(182); }
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null && src.StatPosBuff[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(183); }
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null && src.StatPosBuff[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(184); }
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null && src.StatNegBuff[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(185); }
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null && src.StatNegBuff[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(186); }
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null && src.StatNegBuff[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(187); }
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null && src.StatNegBuff[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(188); }
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null && src.StatNegBuff[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(174); blocks.SetBit(189); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(191); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(192); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(193); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(194); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(195); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(196); }
        if (src.Resistances != null && src.Resistances[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(197); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(198); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(199); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(200); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(201); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(202); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(203); }
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null && src.PowerCostModifier[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(204); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(205); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(206); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(207); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(208); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(209); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(210); }
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null && src.PowerCostMultiplier[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(190); blocks.SetBit(211); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(213); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(214); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(215); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(216); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(217); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(218); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(219); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[0].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(220); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[1].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(221); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[2].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(222); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[3].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(223); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[4].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(224); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[5].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(225); }
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null && src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[6].HasValue) { blocks.SetBit(212); blocks.SetBit(226); }
        for (int __c = 0; __c < 4 && __c < 8; __c++)
            if (blocks[__c] != 0) blocks.SetBit(__c * 32);
        byte blocksMask = 0;
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 8; __i++)
            if (blocks[__i] != 0) blocksMask |= (byte)(1 << __i);
        data.WriteBits(blocksMask, 8);
        for (int __i = 0; __i < 8; __i++)
            if ((blocksMask & (1 << __i)) != 0) data.WriteBits(blocks[__i], 32);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(4)) WriteUpdateUnitChannelObjectsMaskPreamble(data, ref blocks, src);
        data.FlushBits();
        if (blocksMask == 0) return;
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(4)) WriteUpdateUnitChannelObjectsBody(data, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(5)) data.WriteInt64(src.Health!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(6)) data.WriteInt64(src.MaxHealth!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(7)) data.WriteInt32(src.DisplayID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(11)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Charm!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(12)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Summon!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(14)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CharmedBy!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(15)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.SummonedBy!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(16)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.CreatedBy!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(19)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.Target!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(22)) WriteUpdateUnitChannelDataInline(data, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(24)) data.WriteUInt8(src.RaceId!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(25)) data.WriteUInt8(src.ClassId!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(27)) data.WriteUInt8(src.SexId!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(28)) data.WriteUInt8((byte)src.DisplayPower!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(30)) data.WriteInt32(src.Level!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(31)) data.WriteInt32(src.EffectiveLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(40)) data.WriteInt32(src.FactionTemplate!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(41)) data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(42)) WriteUpdateUnitFlags2(data, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(43)) data.WriteUInt32(src.Flags3!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(44)) data.WriteUInt32(src.AuraState!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(45)) data.WriteUInt32(src.OverrideDisplayPowerID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(46)) data.WriteFloat(src.BoundingRadius!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(47)) data.WriteFloat(src.CombatReach!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(48)) data.WriteFloat(src.DisplayScale!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(49)) data.WriteInt32(src.NativeDisplayID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(50)) data.WriteFloat(src.NativeXDisplayScale!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(51)) data.WriteInt32(src.MountDisplayID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(52)) data.WriteFloat(src.MinDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(53)) data.WriteFloat(src.MaxDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(54)) data.WriteFloat(src.MinOffHandDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(55)) data.WriteFloat(src.MaxOffHandDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(56)) data.WriteUInt8(src.StandState!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(58)) data.WriteUInt8(src.VisFlags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(59)) data.WriteUInt8(src.AnimTier!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(60)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNumber!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(61)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNameTimestamp!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(62)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PetExperience!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(63)) data.WriteUInt32(src.PetNextLevelExperience!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(65)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModCastSpeed!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(66)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModCastHaste!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(67)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModHaste!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(68)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModRangedHaste!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(69)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModHasteRegen!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(70)) data.WriteFloat(src.ModTimeRate!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(71)) data.WriteInt32(src.CreatedBySpell!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(72)) data.WriteInt32(src.EmoteState!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(73)) data.WriteUInt16(src.TrainingPointsUsed!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(74)) data.WriteUInt16(src.TrainingPointsTotal!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(75)) data.WriteInt32(src.BaseMana!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(76)) data.WriteInt32(src.BaseHealth!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(77)) data.WriteUInt8(src.SheatheState!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(78)) data.WriteUInt8(src.PvpFlags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(79)) data.WriteUInt8(src.PetFlags!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(80)) data.WriteUInt8(src.ShapeshiftForm!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(81)) data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPower!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(82)) data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPowerModPos!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(83)) data.WriteInt32(src.AttackPowerModNeg!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(84)) data.WriteFloat(src.AttackPowerMultiplier!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(85)) data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPower!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(86)) data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPowerModPos!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(87)) data.WriteInt32(src.RangedAttackPowerModNeg!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(88)) data.WriteFloat(src.RangedAttackPowerMultiplier!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(89)) data.WriteInt32(src.AttackSpeedAura!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(90)) data.WriteFloat(src.Lifesteal!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(91)) data.WriteFloat(src.MinRangedDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(92)) data.WriteFloat(src.MaxRangedDamage!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(93)) data.WriteFloat(src.MaxHealthModifier!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(94)) data.WriteFloat(src.HoverHeight!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(95)) data.WriteInt32(src.MinItemLevelCutoff!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(97)) data.WriteInt32(src.MinItemLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(98)) data.WriteInt32(src.MaxItemLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(99)) data.WriteInt32(src.WildBattlePetLevel!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(101)) data.WriteInt32(src.InteractSpellID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(102)) data.WriteInt32(src.ScaleDuration!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(103)) data.WriteInt32(src.LooksLikeMountID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(104)) data.WriteInt32(src.LooksLikeCreatureID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(105)) data.WriteInt32(src.LookAtControllerID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(107)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.GuildGUID!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(112)) data.WritePackedGuid128(src.ComboTarget!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(114)) data.WriteUInt32(src.NpcFlags![0]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(115)) data.WriteUInt32(src.NpcFlags![1]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(116)) WriteUpdateUnitPowerGroup(data, ref blocks, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(168)) WriteUpdateUnitVirtualItem(data, src.VirtualItems!, 0);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(169)) WriteUpdateUnitVirtualItem(data, src.VirtualItems!, 1);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(170)) WriteUpdateUnitVirtualItem(data, src.VirtualItems!, 2);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(172)) data.WriteUInt32(src.AttackRoundBaseTime![0]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(173)) data.WriteUInt32(src.AttackRoundBaseTime![1]!.Value);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(174)) WriteUpdateUnitStatsGroup(data, ref blocks, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(190)) WriteUpdateUnitResistancesGroup(data, ref blocks, src);
        if (blocks.IsBitSet(212)) WriteUpdateUnitResistanceBuffModsGroup(data, ref blocks, src);
    }

    internal bool HasAnyUnitFieldSet()
    {
        var src = _updateData.UnitData;
        if (src == null) return false;
        if (src.Health.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxHealth.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DisplayID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NpcFlags[0].HasValue && src.NpcFlags[0] != 0) return true;
        if (src.NpcFlags[1].HasValue && src.NpcFlags[1] != 0) return true;
        if (src.Charm != null) return true;
        if (src.Summon != null) return true;
        if (src.CharmedBy != null) return true;
        if (src.SummonedBy != null) return true;
        if (src.CreatedBy != null) return true;
        if (src.Target != null) return true;
        if (src.ChannelData.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RaceId.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ClassId.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.SexId.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DisplayPower.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Level.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.EffectiveLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.FactionTemplate.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VirtualItems[0].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[0]!.Value.ItemID != 0) return true;
        if (src.VirtualItems[1].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[1]!.Value.ItemID != 0) return true;
        if (src.VirtualItems[2].HasValue && src.VirtualItems[2]!.Value.ItemID != 0) return true;
        if (src.Flags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Flags2.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AuraState.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackRoundBaseTime != null) for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) if (src.AttackRoundBaseTime[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BoundingRadius.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CombatReach.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NativeDisplayID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MountDisplayID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MinDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MinOffHandDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxOffHandDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StandState.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.VisFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AnimTier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetNumber.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetNameTimestamp.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetExperience.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetNextLevelExperience.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModCastSpeed.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModCastHaste.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.CreatedBySpell.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.EmoteState.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BaseMana.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.BaseHealth.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.SheatheState.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PvpFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PetFlags.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ShapeshiftForm.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackPower.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackPowerModPos.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackPowerModNeg.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackPowerMultiplier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedAttackPower.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerModPos.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerModNeg.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.RangedAttackPowerMultiplier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MinRangedDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxRangedDamage.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxHealthModifier.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.HoverHeight.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MinItemLevelCutoff.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MinItemLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxItemLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.WildBattlePetLevel.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.InteractSpellID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LooksLikeMountID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LooksLikeCreatureID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.LookAtControllerID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.GuildGUID != null) return true;
        if (src.ChannelObject.HasValue && !src.ChannelObject.Value.IsEmpty()) return true;
        if (src.Flags3.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.OverrideDisplayPowerID.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.DisplayScale.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.NativeXDisplayScale.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModHaste.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModRangedHaste.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModHasteRegen.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModTimeRate.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TrainingPointsUsed.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.TrainingPointsTotal.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.AttackSpeedAura.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Lifesteal.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ScaleDuration.HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ComboTarget != null) return true;
        if (src.Power != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.Power[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.MaxPower != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.MaxPower[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ModPowerRegen != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ModPowerRegen[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Stats != null) for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) if (src.Stats[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StatPosBuff != null) for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) if (src.StatPosBuff[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.StatNegBuff != null) for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) if (src.StatNegBuff[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.Resistances != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.Resistances[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PowerCostModifier != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.PowerCostModifier[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.PowerCostMultiplier != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.PowerCostMultiplier[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ResistanceBuffModsPositive[i].HasValue) return true;
        if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative != null) for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) if (src.ResistanceBuffModsNegative[i].HasValue) return true;
        return false;
    }
}
